ip_outcome_note: Card name 'Latios', Dragon type, Rare, Fusion Strike subtype, ability 'Blue Assist' (Latios-exclusive in this paired set design). National Pokedex no. 381, Hoenn Eon Pokemon. Confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: Latios is National Pokedex no. 381, Dragon/Psychic Legendary, male of the Eon Twins pair with Latias (no. 380). Ability: Levitate. Introduced in Generation III (Ruby/Sapphire, 2002, Hoenn).

"It understands human speech and is highly intelligent. It is a tender Pokémon that dislikes fighting." A notable contrast to most Dragon-type Legendaries; consistent across multiple Pokedex generations.

Pokémon Heroes (2002) centers on Latios and Latias as guardians of Alto Mare (Venice-inspired city). Latios sacrifices himself to stop a tidal wave; his soul crystallizes into the Soul Dew, a held item that boosts Special Attack and Special Defense of both Eon Twins in the games. The film was not given a wide North American theatrical release.

In Fusion Strike, Latios (no. 194) pairs with Latias (no. 193): Blue Assist attaches Psychic Energy to Latias; Red Assist (Latias) attaches Psychic Energy to Latios. Synchronized energy-acceleration directly mirrors the Eon Twins' bond. Both are Fusion Strike subtype, enabling Power Tablet and Fusion Strike Energy support.
sources: PokeBeach: Latios, Latias from Fusion Arts
